comments.author: Michael Giver
comments.body: Opened PR #758 (https://github.com/navapbc/oscer/pull/758) for #751 — config model committed (421101e5), reviewed twice, full suite green (2516 ex). Awaiting review + CI.

compiled_state.description: GH #751. Config-model foundation from the Data Source Hierarchy spec. Create Exclusion utility class + ExclusionTypesLoader (extend ConfigLoading) + initializer + config/custom/exclusion_types.yml, mirroring the Exemption quartet. Shape { id => { enabled:, priority: N } }; DEFAULTS = spec's 9 exclusions priority 1-9; transform requires enabled + integer priority. Exclusion.all sorted by :priority. Tests-first. Service return-best change is separate (#752).
compiled_state.title: Add Exclusion priority configuration (yml-configured Exclusion model)
